title: penstemon pumilus
intro: Penstemon pumilus, also known as Rocky Mountain Penstemon, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, and is often used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Penstemon pumilus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds. Penstemon pumilus can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its health benefits.
